# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: "service1"
    host: "example.com"
    routes:
      - path: "/api/microservice1"
        methods: ["GET"]
        plugins:
          - name: "request-id"
            config: {}
      - path: "/api/microservice2"
        methods: ["POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        plugins:
          - name: "request-id"
            config: {}
  - name: "service2"
    host: "example.com"
    routes:
      - path: "/api/microservice3"
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        plugins:
          - name: "request-id"
            config: {}
  upstreams:
    - name: "microservice1"
      targets:
        - url: "http://localhost:8000"
        - url: "http://localhost:8001"
      balancing: "round-robin"
    - name: "microservice2"
      targets:
        - url: "http://localhost:9000"
        - url: "http://localhost:9001"
      balancing: "least-connections"
  plugins:
    - name: "request-id"
      config: {}
